title: Night of the Twisters
description: This is a Modpack using the Protomanly Weather mod inspired by a video made by WhirlChasing with Nocturnal Tornadoes.
body:
Have you wanted to challenge yourself with vanilla while still having a new experience? With this modpack, you'll have to deal with perpetual darkness, perpetual night time, and on top of all that, Tornadoes. It's a fun challenge for those looking for something still vanilla-esque!

# NOTE FROM MOD DEVELOPER:

THIS MODPACK IS NOT MADE FOR LOW END SYSTEMS. It DOES require a computer that is able to run shaders, as I haven't found a way to make the world purely dark, and PMWeather is ALREADY a very demanding mod before adding the shaders.
